channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Woman accusing Vince McMahon of sexual abuse asks WWE to waive confidentiality agreements
item.description: A former WWE employee who filed a lawsuit against the company and ex-leader Vince McMahon, accusing him of sexual battery and trafficking, is asking them to not enforce nondisclosure agreements with other former and current employees and contractors so they can potentially come forward with similar
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chiefs' Xavier Worthy scores touchdown, gives ball to mom in sweet moment
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs rookie wide receiver Xavier Worthy handed the ball off to his mom after he scored a touchdown against the New Orleans Saints on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patrick Mahomes throws for 331 yards, Derek Carr hurt as Chiefs shut down Saints for 26-13 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes threw for a bunch of yards. Travis Kelce caught a whole lot of his passes. And Kareem Hunt plowed into the end zone once again, sending a torrent of red fireworks flying over Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor Swift, Brittany Mahomes spotted in same suite for 1st time this season
item.description: Taylor Swift and Brittany Mahomes were spotted in the same suite for the first time this season on Monday night as the Kansas City Chiefs topped the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge and Rodón unable to deliver as Yankees drop Game 2 to Royals in ALDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two games into this postseason, those big-money deals for Aaron Judge and Carlos Rodón haven't paid any October dividends for the New York Yankees.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saints quarterback Derek Carr leaves with oblique injury in another losing night against the Chiefs
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Saints quarterback Derek Carr was having another tough time against the Chiefs even before he took a wicked shot from blitzing defensive back Chamarri Conner on Monday night, not only ending his game but also New Orleans' hopes of a comeback.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs flee Tampa as Hurricane Milton intensifies in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers said Monday they will leave the area as Hurricane Milton continues its path toward the state in the Gulf of Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Manny Machado rips Dodgers' Jack Flaherty, says pitcher hit Padres teammate on purpose
item.description: San Diego Padres star Manny Machado called out Los Angeles Dodgers starter Jack Flaherty, who he believes hit Fernando Tatis Jr. with a pitch on purpose.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vanderbilt, Arkansas fined for fans storming the field after upset wins
item.description: The SEC has fined Vanderbilt and Arkansas after their fans stormed the field following upset wins over Alabama and Tennessee, respectively, on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots captain Jabrill Peppers arrested on assault, strangulation, drug charges
item.description: BRAINTREE, Mass. (AP) — Patriots captain Jabrill Peppers was arrested over the weekend on assault, strangulation and other charges, with police saying Peppers attacked a girlfriend after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fritz and Dimitrov finally advance at rain-soaked Shanghai Masters
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Two days after starting, seventh-ranked Taylor Fritz and 10th-ranked Grigor Dimitrov finally got to complete their second-round matches at the Shanghai Masters on Monday. Fritz, the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Leading in a new league: Oceanside golfer wins top spot in nine matches
item.description: “Medalist of the match is basically between the two teams, the individual who has the lowest score,” explained Oceanside High School golfer Kassidy Stevens.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark a near-unanimous choice as WNBA's Rookie of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP/WGN) — Caitlin Clark has been named the WNBA Rookie of the Year in a near-unanimous vote, giving the Indiana Fever back-to-back winners after Aliyah Boston won the honor last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake plays Minnesota to scoreless draw
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring eight goals in its last three games, Real Salt Lake was unable to find the back of the net in a scoreless draw with Minnesota Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lightning prospects fight for roster spots ahead of Panthers preseason matchup
item.description: Preseason means players fighting for a roster spot get a chance to impress coaches. Center Conor Geekie is one of those players who head coach Jon Cooper thinks highly of.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Team president Jed Hoyer disappointed about 2024, but optimistic about Cubs' direction
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The 2024 MLB playoffs began Tuesday, and the Cubs were once again not among the six teams in the National League playoff field.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
